scripts.build: esbuild src/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/server.js --external:@prisma/client --external:.prisma --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.build:seed: esbuild prisma/seed.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/seed.js --external:@prisma/client --external:.prisma --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
